steps.title: Interpret each term
steps.content: The term $5x$ represents the total cost of $5$ folders, because each folder costs $x$ dollars. The term $2y$ represents the total cost of $2$ markers, because each marker costs $y$ dollars.

steps.title: Interpret the sum
steps.content:
The equation
$$5x+2y=31$$
adds the folder cost and marker cost. Therefore, $31$ represents the combined total cost, in dollars, for all the folders and markers purchased. The answer is C.
